data.title: Add CI/CD pipeline
data.description:
**Labels:** `ci/cd`, `devops`

**Description:**
Set up automated testing and deployment pipeline with GitHub Actions.

**Proposed Solution:**
Create GitHub Actions workflows for testing, building, and deployment.

**Workflows:**

1. **Test** - Run on all PRs
2. **Deploy Preview** - Deploy preview on PR
3. **Deploy Production** - Deploy on merge to main
4. **Security Scan** - Weekly dependency audit

**Acceptance Criteria:**

- [ ] Tests run automatically on PR
- [ ] Preview deployments created for PRs
- [ ] Auto-deploy to production on merge
- [ ] Security scanning enabled
- [ ] Deploy notifications (Slack/Discord)

**Technical Considerations:**

* Create .github/workflows/ directory
* Use wrangler GitHub Action
* Set up Cloudflare secrets in GitHub
* Add status badges to README
* Configure branch protection rules

**Effort & Value Ranking:**

* ⏱️ Time: **Medium** (GitHub Actions setup, workflow configuration, secrets management)
* 🧩 Complexity: **Medium** (workflow orchestration, deployment automation, secret management)
* 💎 Value: **High** (essential for professional development workflow, enables automation and confidence)
